summary: Iteration 13 - Multi-Plant Hierarchy testing complete. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed (Plants/Sectors CRUD, Migration report status=complete with 0 orphan ativos, filtered KPIs/Dashboard/WO/Inspections/Anomalias/Ativos by plant_id and sector_id). Frontend: Dashboard plant filter dropdown shows 'Todas as Plantas' + 'PP - Planta Principal', selecting plant keeps 9 ativos visible. /plantas shows PP card with 4 setores/9 ativos. /setores shows 4 sectors (EMBA=0, MANU=2, PROD=7, UTIL=0 ativos) with plant name. /ativos has Planta + Setor filter dropdowns alongside Status/Criticidade. Sidebar INFRAESTRUTURA section with Plantas/Setores links present. Novo Ativo modal has cascading Planta -> Setor dropdowns ('Selecione a planta primeiro' until plant selected). Nova Planta and Novo Setor modals open with correct fields.

issues: Console: React hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' caused by Emergent's dynamic instrumentation (data-ve-dynamic span) inside <option> tag at App.js line ~2036. Cosmetic dev-only warning, no functional impact.
Console: Recharts warning 'width(-1) height(-1)' on initial render — chart container briefly has zero dimensions before resize observer fires. Cosmetic, charts render correctly afterwards.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/plants returns 1 plant (PP - Planta Principal) with sector_count=4, asset_count=9
Backend: POST /api/plants creates new plant successfully
Backend: GET /api/sectors returns 4 sectors (EMBA, MANU, PROD, UTIL) all with plant_id set
Backend: POST /api/sectors creates new sector linked to plant
Backend: GET /api/migration/report status=complete, 0 orphan ativos, 9/9 with plant_id and sector_id
Backend: GET /api/kpis?plant_id=<id> returns 200
Backend: GET /api/kpis?sector_id=<id> returns 200
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats?plant_id=<id> returns 200
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/trend?plant_id=<id> returns 200
Backend: GET /api/ordens-servico?plant_id=<id> returns 200
Backend: GET /api/inspecoes?plant_id=<id> returns 200
Backend: GET /api/anomalias?plant_id=<id> returns 200
Backend: GET /api/ativos?plant_id + ?sector_id filters narrow results correctly
Frontend: Login admin@manutrix.com/admin123 -> dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Todas as Plantas' + 'PP - Planta Principal' in filter; selecting plant keeps 9 ativos visible
Frontend: /plantas shows PP card with '4 setores' and '9 ativos'
Frontend: /setores shows EMBA(0)/MANU(2)/PROD(7)/UTIL(0) ativos = 9 total, plant name on each card
Frontend: /ativos has Planta and Setor filter dropdowns (4 selects total: Status, Criticidade, Planta, Setor)
Frontend: Sidebar INFRAESTRUTURA section with Plantas and Setores links visible
Frontend: Novo Ativo modal has Planta and Setor cascading dropdowns (Setor disabled with 'Selecione a planta primeiro')
Frontend: Nova Planta modal opens with codigo + nome fields
Frontend: Novo Setor modal opens with Planta (preselected PP), Codigo, Nome, Descrição, Cor fields
action_items: OPTIONAL CLEANUP: Suppress hydration warning by ensuring no dynamic <span> wrappers inside <option> tags in App.js line ~2036 plant filter (caused by Emergent visual editor instrumentation, may resolve automatically).
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is now very large (>4800 lines). Consider splitting into separate component files per route (PlantasPage, SetoresPage, AtivosPage, DashboardPage) for maintainability.
Plant filter dropdown is a raw <select> in dashboard — consider unifying with shadcn Select used elsewhere for design consistency.
No DELETE/UPDATE tests for plants/sectors were exercised end-to-end via UI; only verified modal opens. Suggest follow-up to verify cascade/blocking behavior when deleting a plant with sectors/assets.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Test-created plants/sectors are cleaned up via DELETE in fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Plant hierarchy is fully working end-to-end. /api/plants, /api/sectors, /api/migration/report endpoints exist. Filtering query params plant_id and sector_id work on /api/kpis, /api/dashboard/stats, /api/dashboard/trend, /api/ordens-servico, /api/inspecoes, /api/anomalias, /api/ativos. Frontend has /plantas and /setores routes under INFRAESTRUTURA sidebar group. Dashboard has a plant filter at top. Novo Ativo modal uses cascading Planta -> Setor dropdowns. Two minor cosmetic console warnings (hydration of span inside option from Emergent visual editor instrumentation; recharts initial dimensions). No functional impact.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All tested features work as designed.
